blocks.text: Anfield, Barcelona, and a CS2 Grand Final — Saturday delivers the lot

Bodo/Glimt's 2-1 stunner over Internazionale last Tuesday gave Norwegian football its moment of the season. Arsenal lead the Premier League by five points — tomorrow's London derby against Chelsea is the real litmus test.

blocks.label: 🎮 DraculaN Season 5 — Grand Final day
items: 14:00 — FlyQuest vs 100 Thieves: loser goes home, winner faces HEROIC
18:30 — HEROIC vs Consolidation winner: DraculaN Grand Final
